overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring towering glass skyscrapers with neon digital billboards, palm-lined streets, and flying vehicles overhead. The camera moves from a street corner across a yellow-striped crosswalk and continues down a commercial boulevard with moderate pedestrian activity under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street corner with curved crosswalk

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right
camera turns right to follow the curved crosswalk path

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved yellow-striped crosswalk at a street corner, passing towering glass buildings with neon advertisements

entered.detail: tall glass skyscraper with multiple digital billboards displaying anime characters
large digital screen showing purple-haired anime character in futuristic outfit
line of palm trees along the street median
broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing with red curbs
building facade covered in bright neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city corner with towering glass buildings covered in vibrant digital billboards. The camera walks along a curved yellow crosswalk, passing palm trees lining the street while a flying vehicle cruises overhead. The environment features a mix of natural overcast light and artificial neon illumination from the surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with BIOTECH WALL commercial building

events.description: entering the main intersection crossing toward the BIOTECH WALL building
group of pedestrians crossing the street from right to left in front of camera

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward the BIOTECH WALL building, navigating through crossing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright red outfit walking across the crosswalk from right to left
orange taxi cab parked at the curb waiting

entered.detail: large beige commercial building with prominent blue 'BIOTECH WALL' neon signage
large white billboard displaying 'PASSION' text with portrait
futuristic overhead traffic structure spanning the street with signals
orange ground vehicle parked at the intersection curb

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a busy intersection dominated by the BIOTECH WALL building on the right with its prominent neon signage. The scene features moderate pedestrian density with people crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk in various directions. An orange taxi waits at the curb while the camera navigates through the crossing crowd, with futuristic traffic infrastructure visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street canyon between commercial towers

events.description: exiting the crosswalk onto the main street surface between buildings
second flying vehicle passes overhead traveling down the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the commercial street past the intersection, moving between towering buildings with fewer pedestrians around

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper visible at the end of the street canyon
modern street lamp with extended arm and fixtures

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds down a street canyon lined with commercial buildings. The BIOTECH WALL building recedes into the background on the right as the camera moves toward a distant skyscraper. The pedestrian density decreases, and another flying vehicle passes overhead, emphasizing the futuristic urban atmosphere of the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant city corner through a bustling intersection and into a deep urban canyon of skyscrapers. It begins by walking along a curved yellow crosswalk beneath an overcast sky, passing palm trees and towering glass buildings adorned with glowing digital billboards as a flying vehicle cruises overhead. As the camera enters a busy intersection, the scene shifts toward the prominent neon signage of the BIOTECH WALL building, navigating through a crowd of pedestrians and past an orange taxi waiting at the curb. The perspective then moves beyond the crossing, leaving the intersection behind as the BIOTECH WALL building recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera proceeds down a commercial boulevard toward a distant skyscraper, where the pedestrian density thins and another flying vehicle passes above to emphasize the futuristic scale of the city.
